improvements.areaName: SEO Meta Description and OG Tags
improvements.suggestion: <meta name="description" content="Gideon is your AI-powered trade and business assistant. Get instant answers, voice chat, and professional support for operations and trade. Try three free searches today."><meta property="og:title" content="GDN AI – Gideon | Your AI Trade & Business Assistant"><meta property="og:description" content="Instant AI answers, voice chat, and unlimited workspace access for business owners, traders, and professionals. Start with three free searches."><meta property="og:type" content="website"><meta property="og:site_name" content="GDN AI"><meta name="twitter:card" content="summary_large_image"><meta name="twitter:title" content="GDN AI – Gideon | AI-Powered Trade & Business Support"><meta name="twitter:description" content="Professional AI assistant for trade and business. Voice chat, instant answers, and expert support. Try free today.">
improvements.rationale: A compelling meta description improves click-through rates from search results by clearly communicating Gideon's core value proposition. Open Graph and Twitter Card tags ensure professional, branded previews when the homepage is shared on LinkedIn, Facebook, or Twitter—critical for B2B audiences. The copy highlights key features (AI answers, voice chat, free trial) without inventing claims, driving qualified traffic and conversions.

improvements.suggestion:
Meet Gideon — Your AI-Powered Trade & Business Assistant

Get instant answers, voice chat, and professional support for your business operations. Try three free searches — no card required.
improvements.rationale: This headline immediately names the product and clarifies what it does (AI assistant for trade and business). The subheading highlights three key value props (instant answers, voice chat, professional support) and removes friction by emphasizing the free trial with no payment commitment. Clear, benefit-driven copy builds trust and encourages visitors to engage before hitting the paywall.

improvements.suggestion:
Q: What happens after my three free searches?

A: Once you've used your three complimentary searches with Gideon, you'll be invited to join as a member to continue. Membership starts at just US$2 per day, billed monthly—or save 30 percent with an annual plan. As a member, you unlock unlimited access to Gideon's workspace, voice chat, and professional trade and business support whenever you need it.
improvements.rationale: This FAQ directly addresses the most common friction point in a freemium model: what happens at the paywall. By clearly explaining the transition from free to paid, stating exact pricing, and reinforcing the value members receive, it reduces uncertainty and builds trust—key factors in converting trial users to paying members.
